title: Filipino Roast Chicken
description: A classic Filipino dish featuring a savory roast chicken with a tangy twist.

ingredients.name: sour
ingredients.notes: Filipino-style vinegar or apple cider vinegar

instructions: Rinse the chicken and pat dry with paper towels.
Rub the roast seasoning all over the chicken.
In a separate bowl, mix together the sour and silky ingredients.
Place the chicken in a roasting pan and pour the sour-silky mixture over it.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 45-50 minutes, or until the internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 10-15 minutes before carving and serving.
